slots.caption_ig:
'Best' is a question, not an answer. Best for value? Best for first date? Best when you're hungover at 1am? Each gets a different #1. We ranked all of them separately. Pick your axis.

#ForkFox #FoodRanked #FoodAI #DishNotRestaurant #FoodSmart
slots.caption_fb: There's no single 'best.' Best for value? Best for first date? Best when you're hungover at 1am? Best when your in-laws are visiting? Each gets a completely different answer. We score along all of these axes separately so you can ask the question that actually applies.
slots.image_gen_prompt: Five #1 trophy badges in a row, each labeled with a different scenario (value, date, late-night, family, hangover). Editorial graphic. 1080x1080.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16, 8s. Five tabs slide in: 'value', 'date', 'late-night', 'family', 'hangover'. Each shows a different #1 dish photo. End: 'Pick your axis.'
